hero.name: Joel Leon
hero.description: I build fast, accessible interfaces with attention to detail.

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: I'm a frontend developer passionate about building clear, fast, and accessible web experiences.
about.paragraph2: I've spent several years working with React and the modern JavaScript ecosystem, from prototypes to production-ready products.
about.paragraph3: Outside of code, I'm interested in interface design, web performance, and learning tools that improve how we build for the web.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.paragraph: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? Reach out and let's talk about how I can help.

footer.builtWith: Built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind & Motion
